hero.label: Say Hello to ra'edat
hero.title: Inspiring Social Progress
hero.description: ra'edat is a pioneering platform dedicated to unleashing the transformative potential of Arab women within the orange economy.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To ignite the creative potential of Arab women in the orange economy, fostering a vibrant community of innovative thinkers and changemakers who inspire social progress and economic development.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: To empower Arab women by providing tools, mentorship, and opportunities to thrive in the orange economy.

orange_economy.label: A Creative Revolution
orange_economy.title: The Orange Economy
orange_economy.p1: The Orange Economy encompasses creative industries that blend culture, knowledge, and innovation to drive economic growth. This vibrant sector includes art, music, design, fashion, film, literature, technology, and digital media.
orange_economy.p2: This dynamic economy fosters collaboration among entrepreneurs, artists, and innovators, paving the way for new business models and sustainable development.

about.quote: ra'edat is not just a tool; it’s a catalyst for change.

uniqueness.label: Why We Stand Out
uniqueness.title: Our Uniqueness
uniqueness.p1: ra'edat stands out by creating an inclusive platform specifically designed for Arab women. Our commitment to nurturing their talents within the orange economy empowers them to overcome barriers and maximize their creative potential.
uniqueness.p2: With pioneering features like AI-powered matchmaking and a dedicated marketplace, ra'edat transforms not just individual lives but entire communities.

features.posts: Create posts, articles, polls, events, and courses.
features.groups: Build community groups and sub-groups for organisations.
features.marketplace: Support for creating a branded e-marketplace.
features.mobile: Native app available for Android and iOS devices.
features.gamification: Enhance gamification features to boost engagement.

home.desc_initiative: Ra'edat is an innovative initiative dedicated to fostering collaborations among members and organisations, empowering them to achieve shared goals and build meaningful partnerships within the creative economy, more specifically, the orange economy.

hero.title: A Creative Community
hero.description: The platform will harness women's potential by integrating the orange economy into our pillars, empowering Arab women while fostering economic growth.

growth.title: Personal Growth
growth.desc: Access to tailored educational resources, workshops, and expert mentorship enhances skills critical for success.

networking.title: Networking Opportunities
networking.desc: Connect with like-minded women and industry leaders to share experiences and collaborate on projects.

expression.title: Creative Expression
expression.desc: Engage in a community that celebrates unique talents through various initiatives, including the marketplace.

empowerment.title: Empowerment
empowerment.desc: Investing in women's entrepreneurship strengthens local economies and fosters innovation across the creative sector.

heritage.title: Cultural Heritage
heritage.desc: Promotes cultural pride and sustainable growth by highlighting women's achievements and contributions.

collective.title: Collective Growth
collective.desc: Workshops and panel discussions cultivate a collaborative spirit and knowledge exchange among members.

contact.address: Budaiya Building, Road 711, Block 207, Building 453, Flat 22, P.O. Box 3294, Muharraq, Bahrain
contact.form_title: We’d love to hear from you
contact.form_desc: Fill out the form and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully, we will contact you soon.

partners.heroSubtitle: Collaborating with visionaries to create impact
